title: OCJBs updated LSN ce packs
description: Two types of lifesteal.net custom enchant packs, when using you are able to see custom enchants that people have equipped on their Armor and tools/weapons.
body:
# **Lifesteal.net Custom Enchant packs**
Here are two lifesteal.net CE (custom enchant) packs, I update these right after a new ce releases. There are textures for armor tools/weapons (excluding fishing rods, crossbows and bows) each one has a completely different look so its easy to tell which is which, the one named ''Hoarder'' has textures based on what you'd imagine them to look like and the one named ''Darkleonard'' has coloured outlines.
![ㅤ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a0546ddff1769793e9fe027362ff0871734b64.jpeg)

# **Dependencies**
It will not work without [Varients-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

# **Disclaimer**
I did not start these packs (credits to Hoarder and Darkleonard for starting them) I'm just updating them I don't plan on making money on these as that's wrong.

**It's not required but if you modify and re-Upload the pack I'd like you to give credit to Hoarder, Darkleonard**

Also my discord is _OCJB_ if u want something (there's an underscore before and after but its just making it a weird font)
